## Summary

## Type

- [ ] Skill / orchestration change
- [ ] Persona change
- [ ] Honesty charter change (requires extra review)
- [ ] Docs / install
- [ ] Config / models

## Testing

- [ ] Ran `/install` with `--force` / `-Force`
- [ ] Tested `/council` on a bad idea — got REJECT or strong REVISE
- [ ] Pre-flight displayed before Tasks
- [ ] SKILL.md under 500 lines

## Charter changes

If this PR touches `skill/honesty-charter.md`:

- [ ] Included rationale and behavior impact
- [ ] Did not remove mandatory objections or banned phrases

## Changelog

- [ ] Updated CHANGELOG.md
